paul george.detail: Played 27 minutes, scored 7 points in 144-114 blowout loss to Knicks in Game 4.
paul george.web_narrative: George scored only 7 points on 3-of-7 shooting in 27 minutes, missing the PTS OVER 10 prop. Philadelphia was blown out 144-114, and his limited production appeared to stem from cold shooting (3-7 FG, 1-4 3Pt) in a lopsided loss rather than any confirmed injury exit or restriction.

rudy gobert.detail: Played 30 minutes, recorded 11 points and 13 rebounds in Game 4 win.

stephon castle.detail: Played 37 minutes, scored 20 points in Game 4 loss to Timberwolves.

tyrese maxey.detail: Played 33 minutes; no external sources available.

victor wembanyama.detail: Ejected in second quarter after Flagrant 2 foul, finished with 4 points in 12 minutes.
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama was ejected in the second quarter of Game 4 after receiving a Flagrant 2 foul, limiting him to just 12 minutes and 4 points. The ejection ended his night well short of the PTS OVER 15 prop.

vj edgecombe.detail: Exited game against Knicks with a low back injury and did not return, per Brave search sources.
vj edgecombe.web_narrative: Edgecombe suffered a low back injury during the 144-114 blowout loss to the Knicks and did not return after exiting, per reports. He finished with only 8 points on 4-of-14 shooting, missing the PTS OVER 10 prop due to both the early exit and cold shooting before departing.
